---
title: "Social medicine study guide"
---

## NotebookLM Resources

Explore the AI-generated study materials (NotebookLM) for the following subjects:

::: {.notebook-grid}
- [**Social Medicine** · NotebookLM study notebook](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/8239ce6e-f545-4cca-b3b3-a808487a6ce2){target="_blank"}
- [**Biostatistics** · NotebookLM study notebook](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/4a653e2e-14e0-4ffe-8ac7-942fa7b0c100){target="_blank"}
- [**Bioethics** · NotebookLM study notebook](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/5344e475-f3d5-407f-b276-e349afcadb89){target="_blank"}
- [**Epidemiology** · NotebookLM study notebook](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/6306fd66-2009-4131-84be-79b7201eb536){target="_blank"}
- [**Hygiene** · NotebookLM study notebook](https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/00a56955-d080-48d3-bdd9-899ea473a7fd){target="_blank"}
:::

## Study Guide PDF

```{=html}
<div class="pdf-container">
    <p>If the PDF does not appear, you can <a href="SOCIAL_SEMESTER_BOOK_EN.pdf" target="_blank">download it here</a>.</p>
    <iframe src="SOCIAL_SEMESTER_BOOK_EN.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none;"></iframe>
</div>
```
